song.title: Glorious Day
song.lyrics:
[V1] . D A 1) One day when heaven was filled with His praises One day when sin was as black as could be Jesus came forth to be born of a virgin . D Bm Dwelt among men my example is He . D F#m E Word became flesh and the light shined among us His glory revealed [C] Chorus . A E Living He loved me, dying He saved me . F#m D Buried He carried my sins far away . A E Rising He justified freely forever . F#m D A One day He’s coming, oh glorious day, oh glorious day [V2] . D A 2) One day they led him up Calvary’s mountain One day they nailed Him to die on a tree Suffering anguish despised and rejected . D Bm Bearing our sins my Redeemer is He . D F#m E Hands that healed nations, stretched out on a tree, and took the nails for me [V3] . D A 3) One day the grave could conceal him no longer One day the stone rolled away from the door Then He arose over death He had conquered . D Bm Now has ascended my Lord ever more . D F#m E Death could not hold Him the grave could not keep Him from rising again (rising again) -!!
[C2] Chorus . A E Living He loved me, dying He saved me . F#m D Buried He carried my sins far away . A E Rising He justified freely forever . F#m D One day He’s coming, oh glorious day, . A D A E Oh glorious da-ay, oh glorious da-ay
[B] Bridge . D A E One day the trumpet will sound for His coming (for your coming) One day the skies with His glory will shine (glories will shine) Wonderful day my beloved one bringing (my savior) . D My savior Jesus is mine
[C3] Chorus: Living He loved me, dying He saved me And buried He carried, my sins far away Rising he justified, freely forever . F#m D A D One day He’s coming, oh glorious day, oh glorious da-ay, . A D A oh glorious da-ay, oh glorious day
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C2 B C3
